category_label: NOT a Brazilian World Cup winner
explanation: Zico played three World Cups for Brazil but never won the title.
Brazil exited in the quarterfinals against Croatia. Morocco was the fourth semifinalist.
Guardiola has dominated club football but has never managed at a World Cup.

category_label: NOT a country to host a men's World Cup
explanation: Portugal will host in 2030 alongside Spain and Morocco, but has never hosted before.

category_label: NOT a player to win a World Cup Golden Boot
explanation: Ronaldo has never won a World Cup Golden Boot. Kane 2018, James 2014, Klose 2006.

category_label: NOT a 2026 World Cup host venue
explanation: Chicago is not a 2026 host city. Soldier Field hosted in 1994 but is not on the 2026 list.

category_label: NOT an African nation to reach a World Cup quarterfinal
explanation: Cameroon 1990, Senegal 2002, Ghana 2010, Morocco 2022. Nigeria's best is round of 16.

category_label: NOT a player to score in a men's World Cup final
explanation: Neymar has not played in a World Cup final. Mbappe 2018+2022, Gotze 2014, Iniesta 2010.

category_label: NOT a country to win a men's World Cup on home soil
explanation: Spain won in 2010 in South Africa. Hosts to win at home: Uruguay 30, Italy 34, England 66, West Germany 74, Argentina 78, France 98.

category_label: NOT a World Cup Golden Ball winner
explanation: The Golden Ball goes to the best player of the tournament. Ronaldo has not won it.
Mexico is in CONCACAF, not CONMEBOL.
La'eeb was the Qatar 2022 mascot. The 2026 mascots are Maple (moose, Canada), Zayu (jaguar, Mexico), and Clutch (bald eagle, USA).
